# HelixDB

> HelixDB Enterprise is an object-storage-backed graph database with integrated approximate vector search and BM25 full-text search. Queries are authored in a Rust DSL, deployed as stored procedures via the `helix` CLI, and invoked over HTTP.

## Getting Started
- [Introduction](https://docs.helix-db.com/enterprise/introduction)
- [Local Development](https://docs.helix-db.com/enterprise/local-development)
- [Working with HelixDB](https://docs.helix-db.com/enterprise/working-with-enterprise)
- [Data Model](https://docs.helix-db.com/enterprise/data-model)
- [Architecture](https://docs.helix-db.com/enterprise/architecture)
- [Roadmap](https://docs.helix-db.com/enterprise/roadmap): What we're building and what's coming next
- [Guarantees](https://docs.helix-db.com/enterprise/guarantees)
- [Security](https://docs.helix-db.com/enterprise/security)
- [Tradeoffs](https://docs.helix-db.com/enterprise/tradeoffs)
- [Limits](https://docs.helix-db.com/enterprise/limits)

## Concepts & Examples
- [Indexing](https://docs.helix-db.com/enterprise/indexing)
- [Querying](https://docs.helix-db.com/enterprise/querying)
- [Multi-Tenancy](https://docs.helix-db.com/enterprise/multi-tenancy)

## Using the helix CLI
- [Getting started with HelixDB](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/getting-started): Install the Helix CLI v2, scaffold a project, run a local instance, and send your first dynamic query
- [Local Development](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/workflows/local): Run a local v2 instance and iterate on dynamic JSON queries
- [V2 Cloud](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/workflows/helix_cloud): Authenticate, link a project, and query a V2 Cloud cluster from the CLI
- [Configuration Guide](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/configuration): Reference for helix.toml, ~/.helix/config, and credentials
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/troubleshooting): Solutions to common issues and error messages in Helix CLI v2

## CLI Command Reference
- [CLI Command Reference](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference): Complete reference for all Helix CLI v2 commands and options
- [helix add](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/add)
- [helix auth](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/auth)
- [helix cluster](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/cluster)
- [helix dashboard](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/dashboard)
- [helix delete](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/delete)
- [helix feedback](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/feedback)
- [helix init](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/init)
- [helix logs](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/logs)
- [helix metrics](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/metrics)
- [helix project](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/project)
- [helix prune](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/prune)
- [helix query](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/query)
- [helix restart](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/restart)
- [helix run](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/run)
- [helix status](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/status)
- [helix stop](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/stop)
- [helix sync](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/sync)
- [helix update](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/update)
- [helix workspace](https://docs.helix-db.com/documentation/cli-v2/command-reference/workspace)
